summary: Fixed installer Codex UserPromptSubmit registration so DinoBrain is merged into the first existing prompt-hook group instead of being appended as a separate second group. Only install.ps1 and scripts/verify-installer-hooks.ps1 were changed. Added regression cases preserving why-was-fable-banned and verifying DinoBrain appears exactly once in the first UserPromptSubmit group. Created branch fix/codex-userprompt-hook-merge, committed, pushed, and opened PR #1.
decisions: Do not edit trusted_hash or local Codex hooks.json; fix the upstream installer behavior instead.
Preserve existing UserPromptSubmit groups and remove only DinoBrain hook entries before re-adding DinoBrain to the first existing group.
Keep PR scope to install.ps1 and scripts/verify-installer-hooks.ps1 only.
next_steps: Review and merge https://github.com/clockmansy/dinobrain/pull/1, then rebuild/release installer if needed so fresh installs get the fixed merge behavior.
